calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Feb-28-2023 Granted Per Written Order

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of The Estate
Off Calendar Dec-19-2022 Off Calendar

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Nov-22-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances via Zoom (telephone):
Kelly A. Kilkenny, Esq. for Judith Lee Wong;
No other appearances by any party or counsel on this matter.

The Court stated that it is concerned about the notice issue. Ms. Kilkenny stated that she is not sure what expense that they are to go to with regard to notice, and that the commonality of the names is an issue. The Court stated that it is more concerned with regard to the daughter, that a Google search does not satisfy the Court, and that the Court would look favorably on a skip trace search. Ms. Kilkenny stated that her brother is a private investigator in Oklahoma, that as a favor to her he started a search, and that they don't have dates of birth or social security numbers. In addition, Ms. Kilkenny stated that she contacted an heir search company, and that an heir search requires dates of birth which they cannot provide. Ms. Kilkenny stated that there is a trust, that there were two pieces of property, that there is an account at First Republic, that the account is not in the trust, and that they don't know the amount in First Rebulic account.

At the conclusion of counsel's comments, the Court inquired if there were any objections.

No one appeared to object. There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The will dated April 20, 2018 is admitted to probate. Judith Lee Wong is appointed as the Executor of the estate with full authority. Bond is not required. Isidoor Bornstein is appointed as the probate referee. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for December 19, 2022 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Deputy: R. Loo. Matter not reported.
